We need to show that `DTop = Pi.dTop`.

The DTop structure on a product of DTop-compatible spaces is the product of the DTop structures on each factor. This is the definition of the product DTop structure.

In Lean, this is likely to be a direct result of the definitions:

```tactics

open Topology

    (h‚ÇÅ : Fintype Œπ) (h‚ÇÇ : ‚àÄ i : Œπ, DTopCompatible (Y i)) :

  simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Set.mem_iUnion]
  have h3 : ‚àÄ i : Œπ, DTop s ‚Üî DTop (fun i : Œπ => s i) := by

    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    exact congr_fun (DTop.isSubplot_iff.mpr fun i ‚Ü¶ rfl) i
  simp only [Set.mem_iUnion, h3]
  tauto
```
